name: Kindergarten Beginner Coding — Semester 2
description: An 18-week, play-based Kindergarten pathway for debugging, loops, and making a simple interactive story. Lessons are brief, hands-on, flexible, and designed for adult-guided learning.
learningGoals: Build confidence and curiosity with debugging, loops, and making a simple interactive story.
Communicate learning through talk, drawing, movement, play, or a simple creation.
Practice safe, kind, and responsible participation.

lessons.title: Notice and talk: debugging, loops, and making a simple interactive story
lessons.objective: I can notice details and share a question about debugging, loops, and making a simple interactive story through a close look at debugging, loops, and making a simple interactive story.

lessons.objective: I can notice details and share a question about debugging, loops, and making a simple interactive story through a guided practice with debugging, loops, and making a simple interactive story.

lessons.title: Make or show: debugging, loops, and making a simple interactive story
lessons.objective: I can notice details and share a question about debugging, loops, and making a simple interactive story through a small creation or demonstration about debugging, loops, and making a simple interactive story.
